rationale.R1.1: The agent identified multiple conceptual issues and proposed a tighter framing with specific suggestions, demonstrating a strong understanding of the load-bearing concepts.
rationale.R1.5: The agent suggested a clear section plan with rationale for each part, indicating a coherent end-to-end structure.
